introSection: Tulireki is a Mack Rides steel roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Uusimaa, Finland. Tulireki is Finnish for Fire Sled.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 4 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 6 riders per car.

fullText:
Tulireki is a Mack Rides steel roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Uusimaa, Finland. Tulireki is Finnish for Fire Sled.



4 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 6 riders per car.
